evidence.text: A general memory system for agents, powered by deep-research # GAM (General Agentic Memory via Deep Research in An Agent File System) English | [中文版](README_zh.md) A highly modular agentic file system framework that provides structured memory and operating environments for Large Language Models (LLMs). GAM supports both **text** and **video** modalities, offering four access levels: **Python SDK**, **CLI**, **REST API**, and **Web Platform**. ## Features ### 1. Core Features * 📝 **Intelligent Chunking**: LLM-based text segmentation that automatically identifies semantic boundaries. * 🧠 **Memory Generation**:
